requirement_topic.en: Refrigerant — R-600a (isobutane) Acceptance and Flammable-Charge Safety in Egypt
requirement_topic.zh: 制冷剂——埃及对R-600a（异丁烷）的接受及可燃充注量安全
requirement_topic.zht: 製冷劑——埃及對R-600a（異丁烷）的接受及可燃充注量安全

summary.en: Egypt accepts R-600a (isobutane), a low-GWP hydrocarbon refrigerant, for household refrigerators, consistent with the global transition away from HFCs and with Egypt's obligations as a party to the Montreal Protocol and its Kigali Amendment on HFC phase-down. Because R-600a is flammable (A3), the refrigerating system must comply with the flammable-refrigerant safety provisions of the ES standard adopting IEC 60335-2-24 (including charge-limit and construction requirements for flammable refrigerants) and the general safety standard adopting IEC 60335-1. Refrigerant type, charge quantity, and the corresponding safety markings must be documented in the conformity file presented to EOS and at GOEIC import inspection. The appliance is designed for a 220 V, 50 Hz supply.
summary.zh: 埃及接受R-600a（异丁烷）这一低GWP碳氢制冷剂用于家用电冰箱，与全球淘汰HFC的转型以及埃及作为《蒙特利尔议定书》及其关于HFC削减的《基加利修正案》缔约方的义务相一致。由于R-600a可燃（A3类），制冷系统须符合采用IEC 60335-2-24的ES标准的可燃制冷剂安全条款（包括可燃制冷剂的充注量限值及结构要求）以及采用IEC 60335-1的通用安全标准。制冷剂类型、充注量及相应安全标识须在提交给EOS及GOEIC进口检验的合格档案中记录。器具按220 V、50 Hz供电设计。
summary.zht: 埃及接受R-600a（異丁烷）這一低GWP碳氫製冷劑用於家用電冰箱，與全球淘汰HFC的轉型以及埃及作為《蒙特利爾議定書》及其關於HFC削減的《基加利修正案》締約方的義務相一致。由於R-600a可燃（A3類），製冷系統須符合採用IEC 60335-2-24的ES標準的可燃製冷劑安全條款（包括可燃製冷劑的充注量限值及結構要求）以及採用IEC 60335-1的通用安全標準。製冷劑類型、充注量及相應安全標識須在提交給EOS及GOEIC進口檢驗的合格檔案中記錄。器具按220 V、50 Hz供電設計。

standards_or_laws: ES standards adopting IEC 60335-2-24 — flammable-refrigerant charge limits and construction requirements for household refrigerating appliances
ES standards adopting IEC 60335-1 — general safety requirements
Montreal Protocol and Kigali Amendment (HFC phase-down) — Egypt is a party; supports low-GWP hydrocarbon refrigerants such as R-600a

summary.en: Chinese household refrigerators widely use R-600a (isobutane) as the standard low-GWP refrigerant, and the safety of flammable-refrigerant systems is covered by GB 4706.13 (the Chinese adoption of IEC 60335-2-24), including charge-limit and construction provisions, within the CCC scheme. China is also a party to the Montreal Protocol and the Kigali Amendment and has its own HCFC/HFC management programme. Technically, the Chinese R-600a refrigerator design closely matches what Egypt expects, because both draw on the same IEC 60335-2-24 flammable-refrigerant requirements; the difference is which national conformity document and label evidence the destination authority accepts.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱普遍使用R-600a（异丁烷）作为标准低GWP制冷剂，可燃制冷剂系统的安全在CCC制度内由GB 4706.13（IEC 60335-2-24的中国采标版本）涵盖，包括充注量限值及结构条款。中国同为《蒙特利尔议定书》及《基加利修正案》缔约方，并有自身的HCFC/HFC管理方案。技术上，中国R-600a冰箱设计与埃及预期高度一致，因为二者均依据相同的IEC 60335-2-24可燃制冷剂要求；差异在于目的地主管机构接受哪一国家合格文件及标签证据。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱普遍使用R-600a（異丁烷）作為標準低GWP製冷劑，可燃製冷劑系統的安全在CCC制度內由GB 4706.13（IEC 60335-2-24的中國採標版本）涵蓋，包括充注量限值及結構條款。中國同為《蒙特利爾議定書》及《基加利修正案》締約方，並有自身的HCFC/HFC管理方案。技術上，中國R-600a冰箱設計與埃及預期高度一致，因為二者均依據相同的IEC 60335-2-24可燃製冷劑要求；差異在於目的地主管機構接受哪一國家合格文件及標籤證據。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13 — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances (adoption of IEC 60335-2-24; covers R-600a flammable-refrigerant charge limits, CCC mandatory)
Montreal Protocol / Kigali Amendment — China is a party (HFC phase-down)

gap.en: The refrigerant choice is the smallest gap because R-600a is accepted in both markets and both reference IEC 60335-2-24. The residual actions are evidentiary, not redesign: (1) Charge documentation — the R-600a charge quantity must be within the flammable-refrigerant charge limit of ES IEC 60335-2-24 and clearly documented, with the required flammable-refrigerant safety markings and handling instructions in the conformity file and on the product. (2) Accepted conformity evidence — the Chinese GB 4706.13 / CCC result is not, by itself, accepted by EOS; the charge-limit and flammable-safety verification should be reflected in an EOS-accepted test report. (3) Marking and consignment file — the refrigerant data must travel with the GOEIC import file. No refrigerant substitution is required, but the documentation must be re-presented to the Egyptian conformity route.
gap.zh: 制冷剂选择是最小的差距，因为R-600a在两个市场均被接受且二者均参照IEC 60335-2-24。剩余动作属证据性而非重新设计：（1）充注量文件——R-600a充注量须在ES IEC 60335-2-24可燃制冷剂充注量限值之内并清晰记录，可燃制冷剂安全标识及处理说明须在合格档案中及产品上呈现。（2）接受的合格证据——中国GB 4706.13/CCC结果本身不被EOS接受；充注量限值及可燃安全验证应反映在EOS接受的检测报告中。（3）标识与货物档案——制冷剂数据须随GOEIC进口档案。无需更换制冷剂，但文件须按埃及合格路径重新呈交。
gap.zht: 製冷劑選擇是最小的差距，因為R-600a在兩個市場均被接受且二者均參照IEC 60335-2-24。剩餘動作屬證據性而非重新設計：（1）充注量文件——R-600a充注量須在ES IEC 60335-2-24可燃製冷劑充注量限值之內並清晰記錄，可燃製冷劑安全標識及處理說明須在合格檔案中及產品上呈現。（2）接受的合格證據——中國GB 4706.13/CCC結果本身不被EOS接受；充注量限值及可燃安全驗證應反映在EOS接受的檢測報告中。（3）標識與貨物檔案——製冷劑數據須隨GOEIC進口檔案。無需更換製冷劑，但文件須按埃及合格路徑重新呈交。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — flammable-refrigerant (R-600a) charge limits and safety provisions of ES IEC 60335-2-24 must be met and documented; verified by EOS conformity assessment and at GOEIC import inspection
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 4706.13 flammable-refrigerant provisions required within the CCC scheme before sale in China

source.publisher: Egyptian Organization for Standardization and Quality (EOS)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] R-600a is accepted in Egypt and both markets reference IEC 60335-2-24, so this is a documentation gap, not a redesign. Ensure the R-600a charge is within the ES IEC 60335-2-24 limit, that flammable-refrigerant markings are present, and that the verification appears in EOS-accepted evidence in the GOEIC import file.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] R-600a在埃及被接受，且两个市场均参照IEC 60335-2-24，因此这是文件差距而非重新设计。应确保R-600a充注量在ES IEC 60335-2-24限值之内、可燃制冷剂标识齐备，并使该验证以EOS接受的证据形式出现在GOEIC进口档案中。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] R-600a在埃及被接受，且兩個市場均參照IEC 60335-2-24，因此這是文件差距而非重新設計。應確保R-600a充注量在ES IEC 60335-2-24限值之內、可燃製冷劑標識齊備，並使該驗證以EOS接受的證據形式出現在GOEIC進口檔案中。
